name: Hot Mulled Cider
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the apple cider in a large stock pot.
2. Add honey, sliced lemons, cinnamon sticks, minced ginger, allspice berries, and crushed cardamom pods to the pot.
3. Heat over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until it begins to simmer.
4. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce heat to just below simmering.
6. Place 5 cloves in each of the 5 apples.
7. Add whole apples to hot cider as a garnish and keep warm over low heat.
8. When ready, serve hot with a ladle.
